models.Blog: Blog posts covering traffic rules, e-challans, legal rights, and road safety topics published on customer-facing channels.
models.EventNews: Event announcements and news articles about company coverage, partnerships, and industry happenings.

relationships: Blogs and EventNews are independent content types managed under the CMS section
Both content types share a common author field (typically Team Lawyered)
Blogs can be featured on the Challan Pay platform via the featuredOnChallanPay flag
EventNews items have an enable/disable status for controlling visibility
